subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath been received in the Most Holy Presence, and thy supplications have been heard. Praised be God that from the fragrant breeze of the Raiment of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات بمحضر اقدس فائز و عرایضت استماع شد الحمد لله از نسیم قمیص رحمانی در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation
